Retirement Lifestyle

Trade a City Studio
for a Manor Life

Start your second life in the world's most livable city.

Global Cost of Living Comparison: Where does your wealth go further?

In New York or London, you might just be middle class.
In Taipei or Hong Kong, inflation eats away your pension.
But in Cape Town, the same assets elevate you to the ultra-wealthy tier, enjoying a manor lifestyle.

Global City Rent (3-Bed City Center) Fine Dining (2 Pax) Cost Index
🇺🇸 New York (Manhattan) $8,000+ $250+ Ultra High
🇬🇧 London $6,000+ $200+ Ultra High
🇭🇰 Hong Kong $5,500+ $180+ Ultra High
🇦🇪 Dubai $4,000+ $150+ High
🇯🇵 Tokyo $3,500+ $120+ High
🇨🇳 Shanghai $3,000+ $120+ Med-High
🇹🇼 Taipei $2,000+ $80 Baseline
🇿🇦 Cape Town $1,100 (Villa w/ Pool) $40 (Premium Winery) Best Value

* Figures approx. USD equivalent for comparison.

Luxury Living

Golf & Wine Estate Living
Unmatched Lifestyle

Imagine your backyard is a top-100 golf course or endless rolling vineyards.

In Cape Town's Gated Communities, you enjoy ultimate security and privacy. Estates often feature clubs, restaurants, gyms, and even dedicated medical centers, creating a self-sufficient premier lifestyle circle.

Ultimate Security

24/7 armed response, infrared fencing, and biometric access control.

Elite Community

Neighbors are often retired European executives and local entrepreneurs.

Cost of Living Snapshot (Taipei vs Cape Town)

Item (in TWD approx.) Taipei Cape Town
City Center 3-Bed Apartment Rent $60,000+ $35,000 (w/ Pool)
Fine Dining for Two $3,000 $1,200
Golf Green Fee $3,000+ $500 - 800
Personal Trainer (1 hr) $1,500 $600

* Data for reference only, subject to exchange rate fluctuations.

Book Your Retirement Paradise

We offer a one-stop service for "Retirement Visa Application" and "Relocation Settlement". From visa processing, house hunting to medical insurance, we assist you in English/Chinese every step of the way.
